description: Scientists, engineers, and futurists who believe technology is the answer to every human problem. They prioritize research above all else.
Manufacturing interests and growth economists who view industrial output as the engine of civilization. They demand heavy investment in production.
Advocates for sustainable energy and planetary stewardship. They support clean power and are skeptical of unchecked industrial expansion.
Global cooperation advocates who believe human welfare and food security must underpin all civilizational ambition.
Traditionalists who prioritize stability, self-sufficiency, and proven approaches. Skeptical of rapid change but supportive of steady progress.
